case_title: ROBERT J BRODNIK VS. BULLOCK & ASSOCIATES, INC., A WASHINGTON

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRODNIK, ROBERT J AS TO DEFENDANT BULLOCK & ASSOCIATES, INC., A WASHINGTON CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
